variants: Arzu Ulutan specializes in gerontology and is a respected member of the Dewgrass Jazz Circle. Under the guidance of her mentor, Ankita Ghosh, she has dedicated her career to understanding the complexities of aging. Arzu has received the prestigious Copperwing Inspiration Grant, which supports her research endeavors related to elderly care. Additionally, she holds the Unicorn Saddler Clearance, which certifies her unique skills and contributions to her field. Through her various affiliations and accomplishments, Arzu continues to make an impact in gerontological studies.
